dublinCore.dc:title: 119 S4002 IS: Foreign Service Age Integration and Reform (FAIR) Act of 2026
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

form.current-chamber: IN THE SENATE OF THE UNITED STATES

action.action-desc: Ms. Rosen (for herself, Mr. Sullivan, Mr. Van Hollen, and Mr. McCormick) introduced the following bill; which was read twice and referred to the Committee on Foreign Relations

form.official-title: To raise the Foreign Service mandatory retirement age by aligning it with the Social Security Full Retirement Age, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Foreign Service Age Integration and Reform (FAIR) Act of 2026.

Section 812(a)(1) of the Foreign Service Act of 1980 (22 U.S.C. 4052(a)(1)) is amended by striking age 65 and inserting age 67 or the applicable retirement age (as defined in section 216(l) of the Social Security Act (42 U.S.C. 416(l))), whichever is greater,.
